name: Team Happy MeatBILL - Animatic Battle 4A
description:
Anything but working on my requests..

THE 4A VERSION IS HERE!

Not to be confused with its rival team: Happy Meatball.


Happy Meatbill, stylized as Happy Meatb■ll, is one of the many 8 teams in Animatic Battle, being the second team to have an Object Fool veteran eliminated. Happy Meatbill was formed due to Bowling Balls' drawing of a Happy MeatBILL. The team logo includes Happy Meatball's team name, with a black letter i edited over the "a" in "ball"
creator: EPIC_Sobehia
